chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD. IInd Appeal No. 62 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection No.19. 2. For hearing of CMA 1552/2025. 3. For hearing of main case. 01.12.2025. Barrister Jawad Ahmed Qureshi, Advocate for appellants. Mr. Muhammad Sachal R. Awan, Advocate for respondent No.1. Mr. Habib-ur-Rehman, A.D (Legal) NADRA. = For reasons to follow, the IInd Appeal is allowed and the impugned judgment dated 12.03.2025 is set aside. JUDGE Tufail
